# FM LUXE - Premium Gold Jewellery & Luxury UK-to-Nigeria Personal Shopping

> FM LUXE is a premier luxury brand specialising in authentic 18k gold jewellery, high-fashion accessories, and bespoke UK-to-Nigeria personal shopping and custom sourcing services.

## Brand Overview
- **Brand Name**: FM LUXE
- **Website**: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app
- **Specialties**: Authentic Gold Jewellery, 18k Gold Necklaces, Gold Rings, Earrings, Bracelets, Luxury Accessories, and UK-to-Nigeria Custom Shopping & Sourcing.
- **Regions Served**: Nigeria (Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, and nationwide) & United Kingdom.
- **Currency**: Nigerian Naira (NGN / ₦) & British Pound Sterling (GBP / £).

## Core Offerings

### 1. Premium Gold Jewellery Collection
- **Gold Necklaces**: 18k solid gold chains, pendants, occasion statement necklaces, and minimalist daily wear pieces.
- **Gold Rings**: Wedding bands, signet rings, gemstone rings, and stacked 18k gold rings.
- **Gold Earrings**: Gold hoops, drop earrings, studs, and occasion statement earrings.
- **Gold Bracelets & Bangles**: Bangle sets, tennis bracelets, link bracelets, and charm bracelets.
- Shop catalog: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/shop
- Browse categories: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/categories

### 2. UK-to-Nigeria Personal Shopping & Custom Sourcing
- FM LUXE offers a dedicated personal shopping service sourcing luxury fashion items, designer pieces, occasion outfits, and hard-to-find accessories directly from top UK retailers and boutiques.
- Delivered securely to specified addresses across Nigeria.
- Submit a request: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/make-a-request

### 3. Live Order Tracking
- Customers can track live delivery milestones and waybill progress from dispatch to final delivery.
- Track order: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/track-order

## Customer Support & Information
- **Contact Support**: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/contact
- **Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)**: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/faq
- **About FM LUXE**: https://fm-luxe.vercel.app/about
- **Shipping Policy**: Worldwide UK sourcing with fast, tracked shipping to Nigeria.
